scope: Reviewed generated skill repo, docs, CLI smoke output, and roadmap update.

findings.title: Final report claimed CI was checked, but no workflow exists
findings.evidence: No .github/workflows directory is present in the repo.
findings.impact: The release report may imply stronger validation than actually ran.
findings.recommendation: Change the final report to say local validation passed and CI was not configured.

questions: Should this repo add a minimal docs-check workflow now or keep CI for a later pass?
validation_gaps: No GitHub Actions run exists because the repo has no workflow yet.
risks: The CLI has only smoke coverage, not unit tests.
summary: One medium finding and one validation gap.
handoff: Adjust release wording or add CI before claiming CI coverage.
